raw_title: Book Review: ‘How to Rule the World,’ by Theo Baker
book_title: ‘How to Rule the World,’ by Theo Baker
description: In his first book, Theo Baker chronicles an outrageously eventful year navigating an enigmatic center of power.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘On Witness and Respair,’ by Jesmyn Ward
book_title: ‘On Witness and Respair,’ by Jesmyn Ward
description: The two-time National Book Award winner collects essays, profiles and appreciations in a new book, “On Witness and Respair.”

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Theater,’ by James Verini
description: In “The Theater,” the journalist James Verini recounts the bombing of a performing arts space turned refugee shelter in the middle of war-torn Mariupol.
